ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "masterlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the masterlist the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_index" INTEGER /* Index of the unit within the masterlist */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the unit */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key or identifier for the unit */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the unit */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters for the unit (e.g., video URL, puzzle configuration) */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the unit */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target or objective of the unit */,
  "target_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for the unit in seconds */,
  "pass_threshold" REAL /* Pass threshold for the unit (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the unit */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the unit */,
  "show_back" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the back button should be shown */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the unit */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the unit was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the unit is active */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the unit is a draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_lang FOREIGN KEY ("lang") REFERENCES unit_languages ("lang_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_config FOREIGN KEY ("config") REFERENCES unit_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_params FOREIGN KEY ("params") REFERENCES unit_params ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_icon FOREIGN KEY ("icon") REFERENCES unit_icons ("icon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES unit_targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES unit_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_masterlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("masterlist_id") REFERENCES masterlists ("masterlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "masterlists" (
  "masterlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each masterlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the masterlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the masterlist */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* Longer, formatted description of the masterlist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the masterlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the masterlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the masterlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("masterlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* Longer, formatted description of the unit type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon associated with the unit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* Longer, formatted description of the configuration */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Additional settings for the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* Longer, formatted description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* Longer, formatted description of the target */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics for the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_icons" (
  "icon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon */,
  "icon_name" TEXT /* Name of the icon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the icon */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the icon image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_languages" (
  "lang_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "lang_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., sw for Swahili) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Full name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* Longer, formatted description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Additional permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "password_reset_expires_at" TEXT /* Password reset expiration date */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the unit */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, complete) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the accessing user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_access_logs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters for the unit in this version */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the unit in this version */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target or objective of the unit in this version */,
  "target_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for the unit in this version in seconds */,
  "pass_threshold" REAL /* Pass threshold for the unit in this version (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the version is active */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the version is a draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_versions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)
